<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"/>
<title>Tapon Kumer R</title>
<style>
/* ===== RESET & BASE ===== */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --bg: #f5f5f5;
  --sidebar-bg: #ffffff;
  --header-bg: #ffffff;
  --text: #3d3d3d;
  --text-light: #7f888f;
  --accent: #1e252b;
  --link: #3e4c59;
  --link-hover: #e56e5c;
  --border: #ebebeb;
  --pub-accent: #810541;
  --blockquote-bg: #f9f9f9;
  --blockquote-border: #e0e0e0;
  --mini-post-title: #3e4c59;
  --header-link: #3e4c59;
  --year-color: #3e4c59;
  --pubaccess-color: #7f888f;
  --shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}

body.dark {
  --bg: #1a1d21;
  --sidebar-bg: #23272b;
  --header-bg: #23272b;
  --text: #c8ccd0;
  --text-light: #8a9099;
  --accent: #e0e4e8;
  --link: #b0bec5;
  --link-hover: #e56e5c;
  --border: #2e3338;
  --pub-accent: #e57373;
  --blockquote-bg: #23272b;
  --blockquote-border: #3a3f46;
  --mini-post-title: #c8ccd0;
  --header-link: #c0c8d0;
  --year-color: #c0c8d0;
  --pubaccess-color: #8a9099;
  --shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}

html { font-size: 14px; }
body {
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: "Source Sans Pro", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.65;
  transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
}

a { color: var(--link); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; }
a:hover { color: var(--link-hover); }

strong { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }

/* ===== LAYOUT ===== */
#wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 100vh;
}

/* HEADER */
#header {
  background: var(--header-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 2rem;
  height: 3.5rem;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  transition: background 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;
}

#header h1 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

#header h1 a { color: var(--accent); }

#header nav.links {
  flex: 1;
  margin-left: 2.5rem;
}

#header nav.links ul {
  display: flex;
  list-style: none;
  gap: 2rem;
}

#header nav.links ul li a {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--header-link);
  padding-bottom: 3px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}

#header nav.links ul li a:hover,
#header nav.links ul li a.active {
  color: var(--link-hover);
  border-bottom-color: var(--link-hover);
}

#dark-toggle {
  margin-left: auto;
  background: none;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}
#dark-toggle:hover { border-color: var(--link-hover); color: var(--link-hover); }

/* BODY LAYOUT: sidebar + main */
#body-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 2rem 1rem;
  gap: 2rem;
}

/* SIDEBAR */
#sidebar {
  flex: 0 0 220px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}

#intro {
  text-align: center;
  background: var(--sidebar-bg);
  padding: 1.2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: background 0.3s;
}

#intro .profile-photo {
  width: 120px;
  height: 120px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center top;
  display: block;
  margin: 0 auto 0.8rem;
}

#intro .name-title {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

#intro p {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

#intro .email { color: var(--link); font-size: 0.75rem; }

#intro .inst-logo {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  max-width: 120px;
  height: auto;
  filter: var(--logo-filter, none);
}

body.dark #intro .inst-logo { filter: brightness(0.85) contrast(1.1); background: #fff; padding: 4px; border-radius: 4px; }

/* Social icons strip - home only */
#social-strip {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
}

#social-strip a {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}

#social-strip a:hover { border-color: var(--link-hover); color: var(--link-hover); }

/* Sidebar Projects section */
.sidebar-projects h2 {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-light);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.mini-post {
  background: var(--sidebar-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  transition: background 0.3s;
}

.mini-post header { padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem 0; }
.mini-post header h3 { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
.mini-post header h3 a { color: var(--mini-post-title); }
.mini-post header h3 a:hover { color: var(--link-hover); }

.mini-post .host-info { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-light); line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
.mini-post .host-info a { color: var(--text-light); }
.mini-post .inst-icon { float: right; margin-left: 0.4rem; }
.mini-post .inst-icon img { width: 22px; height: auto; }

.mini-post .thumb {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 90px;
  background: var(--border);
  object-fit: cover;
  /* TODO: Replace with actual project image when available */
}

.mini-post .thumb-placeholder {
  width: 100%;
  height: 90px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--border) 0%, var(--bg) 100%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

/* ===== MAIN CONTENT ===== */
#main {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

/* Pages */
.page { display: none; }
.page.active { display: block; }

/* Article / Post */
article.post {
  background: var(--sidebar-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  transition: background 0.3s;
}

blockquote {
  background: var(--blockquote-bg);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--blockquote-border);
  padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--text);
  margin: 0;
}

blockquote p { margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
blockquote p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* Publication sections */
.pub-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.pub-header h2 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--accent); }

.scholar-links { font-size: 0.78rem; text-align: right; line-height: 1.8; }
.scholar-links a { color: var(--text-light); }
.scholar-links a:hover { color: var(--link-hover); }

/* Year nav bar */
.year-nav {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.3rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.year-nav a { color: var(--text-light); padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem; }
.year-nav a:hover { color: var(--link-hover); }
.year-nav .sep { color: var(--border); }

h3.year-heading {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--year-color);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

ol.publist { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }

li.publistitem {
  padding: 0.8rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

li.publistitem:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

a.pubtitle {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--accent);
  line-height: 1.5;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

a.pubtitle:hover { color: var(--link-hover); }

.pubinfo {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.pubauthors { display: block; }

.pubaccess {
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.pubaccess a {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--pubaccess-color);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-bottom: 1px;
}

.pubaccess a:hover { color: var(--link-hover); border-color: var(--link-hover); }

.award { color: var(--pub-accent); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.78rem; }

/* ===== PROJECTS PAGE ===== */
.project-entry {
  background: var(--sidebar-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  transition: background 0.3s;
}

.project-hero {
  width: 100%;
  height: 200px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0e4e8 0%, #c8ccd0 100%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  /* TODO: Replace background with actual project image when available */
}

body.dark .project-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2a2f36 0%, #1e252b 100%);
}

.project-body { padding: 1.5rem 2rem 1.5rem; }

.project-meta {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.project-title {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.project-period {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

.project-lab { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-light); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }

.project-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }

.project-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
}

.project-links a {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.project-links a:hover { border-color: var(--link-hover); color: var(--link-hover); }

.pub-tag {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}

.collab-info {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  margin-top: 0.3rem;
}

.collab-info a { color: var(--link); }

/* FOOTER */
#page-footer {
  background: var(--sidebar-bg);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1rem;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--text-light);
  transition: background 0.3s;
}

/* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  #body-wrapper { flex-direction: column; }
  #sidebar { flex: none; width: 100%; }
  article.post { padding: 1.2rem; }
  .project-body { padding: 1rem; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="wrapper">

<!-- HEADER -->
<header id="header">
  <h1><a href="#" onclick="showPage('home'); return false;">Tapon Kumer R</a></h1>
  <nav class="links">
    <ul>
      <li><a href="#" id="nav-projects" onclick="showPage('projects'); return false;">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" id="nav-publications" onclick="showPage('publications'); return false;">Publications</a></li>
      <li><a href="CV_dev.pdf" target="_blank">CV</a></li>
    </ul>
  </nav>
  <button id="dark-toggle" onclick="toggleDark()">
    <span id="dark-icon">🌙</span>
    <span id="dark-label">Dark</span>
  </button>
</header>

<!-- BODY -->
<div id="body-wrapper">

  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <section id="sidebar">

    <!-- Intro / Profile -->
    <section id="intro">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Tapon Kumer R" class="profile-photo"/>
      <div class="name-title">Tapon Kumer R</div>
      <p>
        School of Computer Science &amp; Engineering<br/>
        VIT-AP University<br/>
        Amaravati, Andhra Pradesh, India
      </p>
      <p class="email">tapon.22bce7458 (at) vitapstudent (dot) ac (dot) in</p>
      
      <!-- Social icons - home page only -->
      <div id="social-strip">
        <a href="https://www.vitap.ac.in/" title="VIT-AP University" target="_blank">🏛</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/tapon22bce" title="GitHub" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.31 3.435 9.795 8.205 11.385.6.105.825-.255.825-.57 0-.285-.015-1.23-.015-2.235-3.015.555-3.795-.735-4.035-1.41-.135-.345-.72-1.41-1.23-1.695-.42-.225-1.02-.78-.015-.795.945-.015 1.62.87 1.845 1.23 1.08 1.815 2.805 1.305 3.495.99.105-.78.42-1.305.765-1.605-2.67-.3-5.46-1.335-5.46-5.925 0-1.305.465-2.385 1.23-3.225-.12-.3-.54-1.53.12-3.18 0 0 1.005-.315 3.3 1.23.96-.27 1.98-.405 3-.405s2.04.135 3 .405c2.295-1.56 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.66 1.65.24 2.88.12 3.18.765.84 1.23 1.905 1.23 3.225 0 4.605-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.925.435.375.81 1.095.81 2.22 0 1.605-.015 2.895-.015 3.3 0 .315.225.69.825.57A12.02 12.02 0 0024 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12z"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&amp;user=hwCwrJQAAAAJ" title="Google Scholar" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 24a7 7 0 1 1 0-14 7 7 0 0 1 0 14zm0-24L0 9.5l4.838 3.94A8 8 0 0 1 12 9a8 8 0 0 1 7.162 4.44L24 9.5z"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tapon-kumer-r-2b0728261/" title="LinkedIn" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 0 1-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 1 1 2.063 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-3474-7573" title="ORCID" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.372 0 0 5.372 0 12s5.372 12 12 12 12-5.372 12-12S18.628 0 12 0zM7.369 4.378c.525 0 .947.431.947.947s-.422.947-.947.947a.95.95 0 0 1-.947-.947c0-.525.422-.947.947-.947zm-.722 3.038h1.444v10.041H6.647V7.416zm3.562 0h3.9c3.712 0 5.344 2.653 5.344 5.025 0 2.578-2.016 5.016-5.325 5.016h-3.919V7.416zm1.444 1.303v7.444h2.297c3.272 0 4.022-2.484 4.022-3.722 0-2.016-1.284-3.722-4.097-3.722h-2.222z"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tapon-K-Ray/" title="ResearchGate" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19.586 0c-.818 0-1.508.19-2.073.565-.563.377-.97.936-1.213 1.68a12.193 12.193 0 0 0-.368 1.174 19.722 19.722 0 0 0-.214 1.524 19.056 19.056 0 0 0-.07 1.812v1.406a8.22 8.22 0 0 0 .07 1.063 5.38 5.38 0 0 0 .234 1.01c.115.326.267.622.452.884.189.267.428.5.716.7.29.2.628.354 1.016.463.388.107.83.162 1.33.162 1.08 0 1.95-.284 2.605-.852.654-.566.98-1.356.98-2.374v-.63a.54.54 0 0 0-.163-.404.536.536 0 0 0-.392-.157h-2.717a.526.526 0 0 0-.384.157.524.524 0 0 0-.159.384v.28c0 .152.053.283.159.39.104.108.234.162.384.162h1.742v.278c0 .524-.162.938-.484 1.24-.32.302-.773.452-1.353.452-.424 0-.772-.07-1.046-.208a1.636 1.636 0 0 1-.654-.598 2.667 2.667 0 0 1-.34-.93 6.3 6.3 0 0 1-.099-1.172V8.47c0-.437.033-.838.1-1.203.066-.364.175-.677.33-.938a1.59 1.59 0 0 1 .608-.604c.255-.143.56-.214.918-.214.414 0 .752.087 1.016.26.264.175.464.41.6.707.137.294.217.625.242.99h1.496a3.43 3.43 0 0 0-.362-1.508 2.833 2.833 0 0 0-.857-1.045 3.76 3.76 0 0 0-1.215-.6A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.586 0zM.002 0v24h8.386a8.39 8.39 0 0 0 3.273-.634 8.274 8.274 0 0 0 2.621-1.726 7.983 7.983 0 0 0 1.74-2.57 8.024 8.024 0 0 0 .632-3.17 8.1 8.1 0 0 0-.39-2.516 7.926 7.926 0 0 0-1.124-2.19 7.756 7.756 0 0 0-1.767-1.675 7.83 7.83 0 0 0-2.28-1.063l-.017-.005A6.02 6.02 0 0 0 13.3 5.793a5.81 5.81 0 0 0-.56-2.54A5.57 5.57 0 0 0 11.21 1.53 5.638 5.638 0 0 0 9.32.534 6.16 6.16 0 0 0 7.063 0H.002zm1.493 1.493h5.57c.654 0 1.27.1 1.848.3.577.198 1.083.491 1.518.876.436.385.78.857 1.035 1.415.255.56.381 1.19.381 1.897 0 .682-.12 1.3-.36 1.848a4.117 4.117 0 0 1-1.001 1.39 4.418 4.418 0 0 1-1.515.878 5.52 5.52 0 0 1-1.906.307H1.495V1.493zm0 10.403h5.57c.83 0 1.598.13 2.303.392a5.613 5.613 0 0 1 1.837 1.102 5.02 5.02 0 0 1 1.21 1.706c.29.66.434 1.39.434 2.195a6.4 6.4 0 0 1-.44 2.393 5.358 5.358 0 0 1-1.248 1.876 5.697 5.697 0 0 1-1.938 1.226 6.761 6.761 0 0 1-2.498.443H1.495V11.896z"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://x.com/realTaponRay" title="X / Twitter" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-4.714-6.231-5.401 6.231H2.746l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.261 5.638 5.902-5.638zm-1.161 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://pixelfed.social/taponsgallery" title="Pixelfed Gallery" target="_blank">📸</a>
      </div>

      <a href="https://www.vitap.ac.in/" target="_blank">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="VIT-AP University" class="inst-logo"/>
      </a>
    </section>

    <!-- Sidebar Projects -->
    <section class="sidebar-projects" id="sidebar-projects-section">
      <h2>Projects</h2>
      <div class="mini-posts">

        <article class="mini-post">
          <header>
            <h3><a href="#" onclick="showPage('projects'); return false;">Human-Robot Interaction &amp; Social Robotics</a></h3>
            <span class="host-info">
              SCSE, VIT-AP University<br/>
              Advisor: <a href="mailto:rajkumar.y@vitap.ac.in"><strong>Rajkumar Yesuraj</strong></a>
            </span>
          </header>
          <!-- TODO: Replace with actual project image when available -->
          <div class="thumb-placeholder">Image coming soon</div>
        </article>

        <article class="mini-post">
          <header>
            <h3><a href="#" onclick="showPage('projects'); return false;">Deep Learning for Medical Imaging</a></h3>
            <span class="host-info">SCSE, VIT-AP University</span>
          </header>
          <!-- TODO: Replace with actual project image when available -->
          <div class="thumb-placeholder">Image coming soon</div>
        </article>

        <article class="mini-post">
          <header>
            <h3><a href="#" onclick="showPage('projects'); return false;">Natural Language Processing &amp; LLMs</a></h3>
            <span class="host-info">SCSE, VIT-AP University</span>
          </header>
          <!-- TODO: Replace with actual project image when available -->
          <div class="thumb-placeholder">Image coming soon</div>
        </article>

      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Footer credit -->
    <section id="footer">
      <p style="font-size:0.65rem; color:var(--text-light);">
        &copy; Tapon Kumer R. Design inspired by <a href="http://html5up.net" style="color:var(--text-light);">HTML5 UP</a>.
      </p>
    </section>

  </section><!-- /sidebar -->


  <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
  <div id="main">

    <!-- ====== HOME PAGE ====== -->
    <div id="page-home" class="page active">

      <article class="post">
        <blockquote>
          <p>I am a B.Tech student in Computer Science &amp; Engineering at <a href="https://www.vitap.ac.in/">VIT-AP University</a>, Amaravati, Andhra Pradesh, India. My research interests span <strong>Human-Robot Interaction</strong>, <strong>Deep Learning</strong>, <strong>Computer Vision</strong>, and <strong>Natural Language Processing</strong>.</p>

          <p>My research goal is to develop intelligent systems that bridge the gap between human cognition and machine understanding — with applications in assistive technologies, social robotics, and medical image analysis. I focus on building robust AI models while rigorously evaluating their real-world impact. I am particularly interested in <strong>multimodal learning</strong>, <strong>transformer-based architectures</strong>, and <strong>human-centered AI</strong>.</p>
        </blockquote>
      </article>

      <article class="post">
        <div class="pub-header">
          <h2>Recent Publications</h2>
          <div class="scholar-links">
            <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&amp;user=hwCwrJQAAAAJ" target="_blank">Google Scholar Profile</a><br/>
            <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tapon-K-Ray/" target="_blank">ResearchGate Profile</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <h3 class="year-heading">2024–2025</h3>
        <ol class="publist">
          <li class="publistitem">
            <a href="#" class="pubtitle"><!-- TODO: Add paper title -->Deep Learning-Based Approaches for Medical Image Segmentation and Analysis.</a>
            <div class="pubinfo">
              <span class="pubauthors"><strong>Ray, T.K.</strong>, Yesuraj, R., et al.</span>
              <!-- TODO: Add venue/journal name -->
              Conference/Journal 2025.
            </div>
            <div class="pubaccess">
              <!-- TODO: Add actual paper/preprint link -->
              <a href="#">Published/Under Review</a>
              <!-- TODO: Add abstract text below -->
              <a href="#">Abstract</a>
            </div>
          </li>
        </ol>

        <ol class="publist">
          <li class="publistitem">
            <a href="#" class="pubtitle"><!-- TODO: Add paper title -->Human-Robot Interaction using Multimodal Deep Learning.</a>
            <div class="pubinfo">
              <span class="pubauthors"><strong>Ray, T.K.</strong>, Yesuraj, R.</span>
              <!-- TODO: Add venue/journal name -->
              Conference/Journal 2024.
            </div>
            <div class="pubaccess">
              <a href="#">Published/Under Review</a>
              <a href="#">Abstract</a>
            </div>
          </li>
        </ol>
      </article>

    </div><!-- /home -->


    <!-- ====== PROJECTS PAGE ====== -->
    <div id="page-projects" class="page">

      <!-- Project 1 -->
      <div class="project-entry" id="proj-hri">
        <div class="project-hero">
          <!-- TODO: Replace with actual project image when available -->
          Image coming soon
        </div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-meta">
            <div>
              <div class="project-title">Human-Robot Interaction &amp; Social Robotics</div>
              <div class="project-lab">SCSE · VIT-AP University</div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-period"><!-- TODO: Add project period -->2024 – Present</div>
          </div>
          <p class="project-desc">
            <!-- TODO: Add full project description -->
            Investigating multimodal interaction paradigms for social robots, focusing on gesture recognition, natural language understanding, and emotion-aware response generation. The project aims to develop robots that can naturally collaborate with humans in real-world environments.
          </p>
          <div class="collab-info">
            Advisor: <a href="mailto:rajkumar.y@vitap.ac.in"><strong>Rajkumar Yesuraj</strong></a>, VIT-AP University
          </div>
          <div class="project-links">
            <!-- TODO: Add GitHub / paper / demo links as needed -->
            <a href="https://github.com/tapon22bce" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
            <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&amp;user=hwCwrJQAAAAJ" target="_blank">Publications</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Project 2 -->
      <div class="project-entry" id="proj-dl-med">
        <div class="project-hero">
          <!-- TODO: Replace with actual project image when available -->
          Image coming soon
        </div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-meta">
            <div>
              <div class="project-title">Deep Learning for Medical Imaging</div>
              <div class="project-lab">SCSE · VIT-AP University</div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-period"><!-- TODO: Add project period -->2024 – Present</div>
          </div>
          <p class="project-desc">
            <!-- TODO: Add full project description -->
            Developing deep neural network architectures for automated segmentation and classification in medical imaging tasks, including MRI and CT scan analysis. We integrate attention mechanisms and vision transformers for improved diagnostic accuracy.
          </p>
          <div class="collab-info">
            Advisor: <a href="mailto:rajkumar.y@vitap.ac.in"><strong>Rajkumar Yesuraj</strong></a>, VIT-AP University
          </div>
          <div class="project-links">
            <!-- TODO: Add GitHub / paper / demo links as needed -->
            <a href="https://github.com/tapon22bce" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
            <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tapon-K-Ray/" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Project 3 -->
      <div class="project-entry" id="proj-nlp">
        <div class="project-hero">
          <!-- TODO: Replace with actual project image when available -->
          Image coming soon
        </div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-meta">
            <div>
              <div class="project-title">Natural Language Processing &amp; LLMs</div>
              <div class="project-lab">SCSE · VIT-AP University</div>
            </div>
            <div class="project-period"><!-- TODO: Add project period -->2023 – Present</div>
          </div>
          <p class="project-desc">
            <!-- TODO: Add full project description -->
            Exploring large language model fine-tuning and prompt engineering techniques for domain-specific tasks. Current work focuses on building lightweight, instruction-tuned models for low-resource languages and specialized scientific domains.
          </p>
          <div class="collab-info">
            Advisor: <a href="mailto:rajkumar.y@vitap.ac.in"><strong>Rajkumar Yesuraj</strong></a>, VIT-AP University
          </div>
          <div class="project-links">
            <!-- TODO: Add GitHub / paper / demo links as needed -->
            <a href="https://github.com/tapon22bce" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
            <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&amp;user=hwCwrJQAAAAJ" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /projects -->


    <!-- ====== PUBLICATIONS PAGE ====== -->
    <div id="page-publications" class="page">

      <article class="post">
        <div class="pub-header">
          <h2>Publications</h2>
          <div class="scholar-links">
            <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&amp;user=hwCwrJQAAAAJ" target="_blank">Google Scholar Profile</a><br/>
            <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tapon-K-Ray/" target="_blank">ResearchGate Profile</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Year navigation tracking bar -->
        <div class="year-nav">
          <a href="#year-2025">2025</a><span class="sep">|</span>
          <a href="#year-2024">2024</a><span class="sep">|</span>
          <!-- TODO: Add more years as publications grow -->

        <!-- 2025 -->
        <h3 class="year-heading"><span id="year-2025"></span>2025</h3>
        <ol class="publist">
          <li class="publistitem">

        <!-- 2024 -->

        <ol class="publist">

            <div class="pubinfo">

                <strong>Ray, T.K.</strong>, Yesuraj, R.
              </span>
              Conference/Journal 2024.
            </div>
            <div class="pubaccess">
              <a href="#">Published/Under Review</a>
              <!-- TODO: Add abstract text here -->

          </li>

          <li class="publistitem">
            <!-- TODO: Update paper title, authors, venue -->
            <a href="#" class="pubtitle">Natural Language Processing for Low-Resource Languages: A Survey.</a>
            <div class="pubinfo">
              <span class="pubauthors">
                <strong>Ray, T.K.</strong>, et al.
              </span>
              <!-- TODO: Add venue -->
              Workshop/Conference 2024.
            </div>

              <a href="#">Published/Under Review</a>

      </article>
    </div><!-- /publications -->

  </div><!-- /main -->

</div><!-- /body-wrapper -->

<footer id="page-footer">
  &copy; Tapon Kumer R &mdash; VIT-AP University &bull; Design inspired by <a href="http://html5up.net">HTML5 UP</a>
</footer>

</div><!-- /wrapper -->

<script>
// Page navigation
function showPage(page) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page-' + page).classList.add('active');

  // Update nav active states
  document.querySelectorAll('#header nav.links ul li a').forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
  if (page === 'projects') document.getElementById('nav-projects').classList.add('active');
  if (page === 'publications') document.getElementById('nav-publications').classList.add('active');

  // Sidebar projects section: hide on projects/publications page? Keep visible always (matches original)
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Dark mode
function toggleDark() {
  const isDark = document.body.classList.toggle('dark');
  document.getElementById('dark-icon').textContent = isDark ? '☀️' : '🌙';
  document.getElementById('dark-label').textContent = isDark ? 'Light' : 'Dark';
  localStorage.setItem('darkMode', isDark ? '1' : '0');
}

// Persist dark mode preference
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  if (localStorage.getItem('darkMode') === '1') toggleDark();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
